translations.en: a gnarled man with knobby muscles.
translations.zh: 肌肉虯結、身形粗獷的男子。

translations.en: "Hullo, $G." He touches his cap respectfully.
translations.zh: 「你好，$G。」他恭敬地碰了碰帽沿。

translations.en: He has a very sharp knife with which he prunes off less productive branches.
translations.zh: 他手持一把極為鋒利的刀，用來剪去不夠茂盛的枝條。

translations.en: "Mind that you stay out of the flight paths of the @bees, $G."
translations.zh: 「小心別擋住@蜜蜂的飛行路線，$G。」

translations.en: "Eckhart the vinekeeper, at your service,
translations.zh: 「葡萄園看守人艾克哈特，隨時效勞，

translations.en: ma'am."
translations.zh: 女士。」

translations.en: sir."
translations.zh: 先生。」

translations.en: You notice the bees have regular aerial routes all about the vineyard.
translations.zh: 你注意到蜜蜂在葡萄園四周有固定的飛行路線。

translations.en: "Zeke keeps bees on the other side of the abbey, $G."
translations.zh: 「齊克在修道院的另一側養蜜蜂，$G。」

translations.en: "I care for the @garden and tend the @vines."
translations.zh: 「我照料@花園，也打理@葡萄藤。」

translations.en: "Some of our rosebushes were planted by druids hundreds of years ago."
translations.zh: 「我們的某些玫瑰叢是幾百年前由德魯伊種下的。」

translations.en: "Eventually, we became the Brotherhood of the Rose."
translations.zh: 「後來，我們便成了玫瑰兄弟會。」

translations.en: "These rows," he gestures, "are
translations.zh: 「這幾排，」他比手勢，「是
translations.note: split string，下接品種名（系統字串）

translations.en: "Here at the abbey we grow
translations.zh: 「修道院這裡種的是

translations.en: @seedless grapes."
translations.zh: @無籽葡萄。」

translations.en: "Amazing, ain't it, $G. The @enchanter made them for us."
translations.zh: 「神奇吧，$G。@魔法師為我們培育出來的。」

translations.en: "Now I grow new vines by grafting seedless @grapevines onto regular rootstocks."
translations.zh: 「現在我用嫁接的方式，把無籽@葡萄藤接到普通的砧木上培育新藤。」

translations.en: "Yes, $G. He lives east of here, between two rivers."
translations.zh: 「是的，$G。他住在這裡以東，兩條河之間。」

translations.en: "His hut be due north of Britain, or so they tell me."
translations.zh: 「他的小屋就在不列顛的正北方，至少他們這樣說。」

translations.en: "Visit me in the fields some time and I'll give you some!"
translations.zh: 「改天來田裡找我，我給你一些！」

translations.en: "Now those grapes there are for making @wine."
translations.zh: 「那邊那些葡萄是用來釀@葡萄酒的。」

translations.en: Dupre says "I cannot say which I like better: wine from grapes or mead from honey!"
translations.zh: 杜普雷說：「我實在無法分辨哪個更好：葡萄釀的酒，還是蜂蜜釀的蜂蜜酒！」

translations.en: "And these over here are for eating."
translations.zh: 「而這邊的是拿來吃的。」

translations.en: He gives you a plump little bunch of sweet table grapes.
translations.zh: 他遞給你一小串飽滿甜美的食用葡萄。

translations.en: "Ask @Faren of that."
translations.zh: 「那就去問@法倫吧。」

translations.en: "Yes, Faren--the local winemaker."
translations.zh: 「是的，法倫——本地的釀酒人。」

translations.en: He waves and turns back to work.
translations.zh: 他揮了揮手，轉身繼續幹活。

translations.en: Eckhart waves goodbye.
translations.zh: 艾克哈特揮手道別。

translations.en: "Beg pardon, $G?"

translator_notes: 艾克哈特是修道院的葡萄園看守人，負責種植無籽葡萄（由魔法師尼可迪默斯培育）及打理玫瑰花園。修道院因此成為玫瑰兄弟會。split strings 處理：offset 695/728 為半句開頭，無引號結尾。
